GenerateNumbersRequest.description: Generate an A/B number pool from a chosen origin + drop sale zone.
GenerateNumbersRequest.title: GenerateNumbersRequest

GeneratePoolRequest.description:
(Re)generate a node's number pool. Empty fields reuse the node's stored
zones/codes/length so a bare POST just refreshes the pool.
GeneratePoolRequest.title: GeneratePoolRequest

GroupStartRequest.description:
Optionally start only a SUBSET of a group's nodes. ``node_ids`` = None or
empty means "all member nodes" (the common case).
GroupStartRequest.title: GroupStartRequest

LoopPresetRequest.description:
A saved loop recipe: destination + ACD/rate/targets, but NO source. The
node or group to run it on is chosen at run time (POST .../run).
LoopPresetRequest.title: LoopPresetRequest

NodeGroupRequest.description:
A group of nodes sharing a destination route. Starting the group fans a
loop out to every member node (each on its own IP + pool).
NodeGroupRequest.title: NodeGroupRequest

RunPresetRequest.description:
Where to fire a preset: a single source-IP node, OR a group (optionally a
subset of its members via ``node_ids``).
RunPresetRequest.title: RunPresetRequest

StartLoopRequest.description:
Loop-campaign start request with bounded, security-validated inputs.

Structural bounds (negatives, zero, port range, transport set) are enforced
here and surface as 422. Config-dependent checks — the dest_host
private/loopback/SSRF block and the rate/channel upper caps — run in the
endpoint (they need the runtime Config) and also surface as 422.
StartLoopRequest.title: StartLoopRequest

info.description: GenCall SIP Traffic Generator - REST API
info.title: GenCall API

get.description: UAS health + current answered-call count (design §4.4).

post.description: Authenticate a user and issue a session token.
Revoke the current session token (idempotent).

get.description:
Return the current principal (logged-in username, or the API key name).

``role`` + ``can_write`` let the console hide write controls for a viewer.
This worker's current inbound trust whitelist + drop flag.

post.description: Hot-apply an inbound trust whitelist (controller push). Empty ips = allow-all.

get.description: List all configured connectors.

post.description: Create a new connector.

get.description:
Legacy console auto-auth — superseded by the login flow (/api/auth/login).

404s once ANY console user account exists. In the residual zero-user window it
still mints the key, but ONLY for a loopback caller (so an exposed/0-user box
cannot hand admin to the network), and a DB error fails CLOSED instead of
handing out the key.

Fleet-wide inbound trust view for the console = this worker's whitelist.
``enabled`` = the list is non-empty (being enforced).

post.description:
Apply the inbound trust whitelist on THIS worker and push it to every
remote worker (Server rows with an api_url). ``enabled=false`` => allow-all
(an empty list is applied/pushed).

get.description:
Per-node CPU/RAM across the fleet for the Fleet page. Each node (Server
row) reports its box: blank api_url = THIS box (local _box_resources()),
otherwise the remote worker's /api/resources is polled. Resources are cached
per box, so two IPs sharing one box don't poll it twice.
Health check endpoint.
Get test run history from database.
List saved loop presets (newest first).

post.description: Create a saved loop preset.

delete.description: Delete a preset (does not touch any running campaign it launched).

post.description:
Run a saved preset on a chosen source-IP node OR a group.

The preset supplies the recipe (dest/ACD/rate/targets); the node or group
supplies the source IP + number pool. Running on a group fans the recipe out
to every member node (one loop per IP). Returns a per-node result list.

get.description: List all Loop Campaigns.

post.description:
Start a Loop Campaign. Refuses (409) when the concurrent cap is reached.

Before spawning, validate the destination against the SSRF/private-range
block and bound rate/channels against the config caps (both 422 on reject).

get.description:
All loop runs across THIS box + every remote worker, each tagged with its
``box`` and carrying loop_stats. Remote workers are the distinct ``api_url``
of the node (Server) rows; we pull each worker's /api/loops/history (which
already folds loop_stats). Declared before /api/loops/{id}.

post.description: Stop a campaign on whichever box it runs on (local or a remote worker).

get.description:
Past + present loop runs with their final loop_stats, newest first.

Feeds the History tab's loop archive. Declared BEFORE /api/loops/{id} so the
literal 'history' path is not swallowed as a campaign id.

post.description:
Generate an A/B number pool server-side and return its path + a preview.

The returned ``csv_path`` is fed straight into a loop campaign's ``csv_path``;
each call then draws a random pair from the pool (the engine renders a RANDOM
-inf). Numbers are validated to start with a real zone code so MADA routes
them to the chosen drop zone.
Size a diurnal campaign from a daily minutes target + ACD.

get.description:
Live status for one campaign incl. its UAC's SIPp stats + latest loop_stats.

The ``loop_stats`` field carries the most recent matcher snapshot (out/in
minutes, completion %, per-call delta percentiles, failures by SIP code —
design §4.3); it is ``None`` until the matcher has run a pass (or when no
matcher/DB is wired).

post.description: Start a tcpdump capture for a running loop (filtered to its dest switch).

get.description:
Per-prefix ASR the adaptive pool sees for this campaign (read-only).

Scores ``call_records`` by destination prefix and labels each keep/drop/
undecided using the live ``[loops] adaptive_*`` thresholds — the same view
the optimizer acts on. Lets the console show which prefixes route (and why a
prefix was pruned) without enabling adaptive_pool. Empty until calls land.

Stream one campaign's per-call records (CDRs) as CSV.

call_records is live diagnostics that retention prunes — this endpoint is
how the data gets out before that (billing reconciliation, spreadsheets).
Streamed in keyset batches so a multi-100k-row campaign never loads into
worker memory.

parameters.description: ISO date/datetime upper bound (a plain date includes that whole day)
parameters.name: until

schema.description: ISO date/datetime upper bound (a plain date includes that whole day)
schema.title: Until

post.description: Stop a running campaign.

get.description: List node groups with their member nodes and running-loop counts.

post.description: Create a node group (a customer/route with shared loop settings).

delete.description: Delete a group. Member nodes are kept (their group_id is cleared).

put.description: Replace a group's settings (name + shared route/loop fields).

post.description:
Start a loop on the group's member nodes (each on its own IP + pool), using
the group's shared destination + loop settings. By default every member is
started; pass ``node_ids`` to run only a subset. Returns a per-node result
list; nodes without a pool or whose IP is already looping are reported, not
fatal.
Stop every running loop on this group's member IPs.

get.description:
This box's live CPU/RAM. The controller's /api/fleet/resources polls this
on each remote worker to build the Fleet page; the local box calls it too.
Country -> [sale zones] tree + zone -> [codes] map (CSV deck + DB overlay).

post.description: Add a user sale zone (overlay on the CSV deck). 409 on duplicate (zone, code).

delete.description: Delete a user-added sale zone by id (bundled CSV zones are not deletable).

get.description: List all available SIP scenarios.

post.description: Save a custom scenario.

get.description: Get the XML content of a scenario.
List origination servers (a server = a source IP a loop can run from).

post.description:
Register a node (a source IP). If origin_zone + dest_zone are supplied,
its A/B number pool is generated immediately (each node = one loop's numbers).

Probe a remote worker's /api/health (the 'Test connection' button) WITHOUT
saving anything. Distinct path; declared before /api/servers/{id} routes.

put.description:
Update a node's name/description/group/enabled (not its pool — use
/generate for that). ``group_id`` of -1 clears group membership.

post.description:
(Re)generate a node's number pool. Empty zones/length reuse the node's
stored values, so a bare POST refreshes the existing pool.

get.description: Auto-detected source IPv4s on this box (suggestions for adding servers).
Get current aggregated stats.
Get stats history for charting.
List one-shot test instances (loop UAS/UAC are excluded — see Loops page).

post.description: Start a new SIP test.
Emergency stop all running tests.

delete.description: Remove a stopped test instance (loop UAS/UAC are engine-managed — refused).

get.description: Get details of a specific test.

post.description: Update the call rate of a running test.
Stop a running test.

get.description: List connected WebSocket clients.
Get WebSocket connection status.
